title: Blind Spot Mirrors For Cars - BeskooHome Waterproof 360°Rotatable Convex Rear View Mirror For Universal Cars -2 Pack
features: 360° Rotatable, Waterproof, Anti-Falloff Design, Superior Quality HD Glass
description: Product Description BeskooHome's blind spot mirrors - Engineered for size and curvature for the best ratio of largest image while covering the least area on your car mirrors. Enhance Your Driving Experience Tips Do not exceed the side mirror edge. Don't wash your car after sticking it, just wait for 24 hours. Fold the car mirror before wash your car. Dimension Weight: 14g/unit Di ameter: 50mm/1.96in Features Compatible vehicles: Universal fit all cars Material: Durable ABS plastic and High quality glass Waterproof adhesive, solid paste, tear off without leaving marks Broad vision, sight effectively eliminate blind spots, increases driving safety How to install the car blind spot mirror Step 1 - Clean mirrors thoroughly with alcohol or other glass cleaner. Step 2 - Strip off the middle part of 3M adhesive from bottom of blind spot mirror. Step 3 - Stick the adhesive to the bottom of the mounting bracket and attach it to the back of the mirror. Step 4 - Peel off protective elm from the 3M adhesive and fix it to the side-view mirror. Step 5 - Press down HARD when the mirror is stick to the black pivot base. Weather Proof P ackage 2 x Exquisite blind spot mirrors 2 x Mounting connector Prevent Glare Prevent Glare 360° Rotatable Great Visibility
